# Buildwise Media — Full Reference

## Company Overview
Buildwise Media is an AI-native marketing agency that builds complete marketing engines for service businesses. We handle strategy, website, content, ads, and AI tools — so business owners can run their business, not their marketing. 85% of production is automated through AI with quality gates at every step.

## Mission
Build Today. Secure Tomorrow. Live Fully.

## Values
1. **GSD (Get Stuff Done)** — We ship every week. No strategy phases that last 6 months.
2. **Integrity** — Month-to-month contract. You own everything. We do what we say.
3. **Excellence** — 47-point QA checklist. PageSpeed 90+. Schema markup on every page.
4. **Add the Light** — Business should serve life, not consume it. We build systems that give you time back.

## Location
Buildwise Media LLC
11720 Amber Park Dr Ste 160 PMB 1232
Alpharetta, Georgia 30009
United States

## Contact
Email: hello@buildwisemedia.com
Website: https://buildwisemedia.com

## Services

### Ascend — Full-Service AI Marketing Engine
**Price:** $5,999/month + one-time Engine Build fee + ad spend (separate)
**Contract:** Month-to-month. Cancel anytime. Client owns all assets.

**What's Included:**
- Custom Website — Built on Cloudflare Pages, 90+ PageSpeed, SEO-optimized, conversion-engineered. Hosted on client's domain.
- Content Production — Social media posts, graphics, video content. Produced, scheduled, published across all channels.
- Paid Ads Management — Meta + Google ads managed against real revenue targets, not vanity metrics.
- AI Business Tools — AI chatbot, AI phone system, appointment booking automation, review management. All configured for the client's business.
- Strategy & Analytics — Monthly performance reviews. GA4 dashboard with revenue attribution. Data-driven adjustments.
- Brand Identity — Professional brand voice card, visual identity system, and messaging framework. Client owns it forever.

**Who It's For:** Service business owners who want a complete marketing department without the department. Proven service, happy customers, existing revenue — need a system to bring more of the right people consistently.

**Not For:** Startups without product-market fit. Anyone looking for a quick fix.

### Ascend Lite — Lead Generation Foundation
**Price:** $3,500/month + ad spend (separate)
**Contract:** Month-to-month. Cancel anytime. Client owns all assets.

**What's Included:**
- Sales Funnel — Conversion-optimized landing page + booking flow on client's domain.
- Paid Ads Management — Meta ads managed against lead targets.
- Strategy — Onboarding strategy session + ongoing optimization.
- Analytics — GA4 setup with monthly performance snapshot.
- Brand Foundation — Brand Voice Card and messaging framework.

**Not Included:** Social media production, AI business tools, full website build, video content. Those are Ascend deliverables.

**Graduation Path:** When pipeline is consistently full, upgrade to Ascend. Integration fee waived for Lite clients who graduate.

**Who It's For:** Service businesses needing lead generation infrastructure but not ready for a full marketing department.

## Process (How It Works)
1. **Discovery (Week 1)** — Learn the client's business, market, and competition in 48 hours.
2. **Build (Weeks 2-4)** — Complete marketing engine built and tested: website, content system, ad campaigns, AI tools.
3. **Run (Ongoing)** — Engine runs. Pipeline fills. Client answers the phone and closes deals. Monthly optimization.

### The 12 Stages
1. Brand Capture — AI-powered assessment of current brand, market, competition.
2. Research & Strategy — Niche analysis, competitor research, target market mapping.
3. Brand Voice Card — Tone, personality, messaging rules documented.
4. Content Brief — Blueprint for all marketing content: topics, angles, keywords, channels.
5. Brand Proof — Client reviews everything. Two approval checkpoints. Nothing ships without sign-off.
6. Website Build — Custom-built to engineering standards. 90+ PageSpeed. Schema markup. SEO-optimized.
7. Content Production — Social posts, graphics, video produced and scheduled.
8. AI Tools Setup — Chatbot, AI phone, booking automation, review management configured.
9. Ad Campaign Launch — Paid campaigns live on Meta and/or Google. Tracked against revenue.
10. Analytics & Tracking — GA4 dashboard. Conversion tracking. Full visibility.
11. Go-Live QA — 47-point quality checklist. Lighthouse audit. Schema validation.
12. Ongoing Optimization — Monthly reviews. Data-driven adjustments. Engine improves every month.

## The Poor Four (Common Problems We Solve)
1. **Lead Droughts** — Feast-or-famine pipeline based on referrals and luck.
2. **Owner Trap** — Business owner IS the marketing department.
3. **Manual Mayhem** — Every marketing task requires manual execution.
4. **Reactive Mode** — Constant firefighting instead of building toward growth.

## Engineering Standards
- Every website: 90+ Google PageSpeed score
- 71 documented processes
- 8/10 publish quality threshold
- 6 types of schema markup per page
- 47-point QA checklist before go-live
- Flesch-Kincaid 5th-7th grade readability
- WCAG AA accessibility compliance

## Key Differentiators
- Month-to-month contract. No long-term lock-in.
- Client owns everything — website, domain, content, ad accounts, brand assets, data.
- 85% AI-automated production with quality gates.
- No junior account managers. No offshore content farms.
- Enterprise-grade marketing infrastructure at service-business pricing.
- Build time: 30 days from first call to running engine.

## FAQ
Q: What types of businesses do you work with?
A: Service businesses — contractors, agencies, professional services, home services, and similar industries.

Q: How is this different from other marketing agencies?
A: We build infrastructure you own. Month-to-month contract. 85% AI-automated with quality gates. You keep everything if you leave.

Q: What does "you own everything" mean?
A: Your website on your domain. Ad accounts in your name. All content, brand assets, and data belong to you.

Q: How long until results?
A: Engine built in 30 days. First qualified leads within the first month running. Compounding results measurable within 90 days.

Q: What if I want to cancel?
A: Month-to-month contract. 30 days notice. You keep everything we built.

Q: How much of my time does this take?
A: 30-minute onboarding call + two Brand Proof approval checkpoints. After launch: 30 minutes per month.
